name: current_pr_configuration
full_help:
current_pr_configuration

Description: 
Get a list of PartitionDefs

Syntax: 
current_pr_configuration  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<config>...]

Returns: 
list of PartitionDef objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<config>]  Specify the PR configuration to be set as current (active); 
              optional

Categories: 
Object, Partition

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
